description_long: This is a playful, child-sized backpack designed to resemble a blue whale, featuring a rounded, streamlined body with a whale face on the front, including two small black eyes and a white snout. The backpack has two side fins and a tail fin, all rendered in matching blue, adding to its aquatic character. The main body is predominantly blue with a yellow zipper and yellow mesh padding on the back for comfort. Two blue padded shoulder straps with black adjustment sections are visible, and a sturdy blue handle is located at the top for easy carrying. The backpack appears to have a single main compartment accessed by a zipper that runs along the top and sides. A small red tag is attached to the side, but no distinct brand logo is visible.
description: A blue whale-themed children's backpack with side fins, a tail, and a friendly face, featuring yellow mesh padding and blue padded straps.
description_view_0: Front view shows the whale face, side fins, and the main zipper running along the top and sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness of the backpack, the side fin, and the yellow zipper track.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the yellow mesh padding, two blue padded shoulder straps, and the tail fin.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the right fin, the zipper, and the profile of the straps and handle.
attribute_strap_design: Two padded, adjustable shoulder straps in blue with black adjustment sections and yellow mesh padding; one blue top handle.
attribute_zipper_placement: One main zipper runs along the top and partially down both sides, providing access to the main compartment.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment accessed by the top zipper; no additional external or visible internal pockets.
attribute_decorative_elements: Decorative elements include a whale face with eyes and snout, side fins, a tail fin, and a small red tag on the side.
